joins.custom: "story"."userId" = "audio_user"."userId" AND "audio_user"."id" = (SELECT a."id" FROM "audio" a WHERE a."userId" = "story"."userId" AND a."storyId" = "story"."id" ORDER BY a."createdOn" DESC LIMIT 1)
